assertions.assertion: Warns against exposing the DCR endpoint without authentication or authorization
Warns against allowing dynamically registered clients to use any grant type - should restrict and enforce PKCE
Warns against using in-memory stores for DCR clients in production
Mentions that client secrets must be stored securely (hashed, not plaintext)
assertions.rationale: No mention of secret hashing or storage security

assertions.assertion: Mentions that software statements must be validated against trusted signing keys - never accept unknown issuers
